name: Big Swing Golf Center
about: Big Swing Golf Center is a family-oriented golf venue offering a variety of activities including a driving range, miniature golf, and a golf simulator. The facility features 50 matted hitting stalls with grass hitting areas and 16 covered bays for year-round practice. Their golf simulator utilizes Flightscope Radar Technology and allows players to simulate world-renowned courses. The venue is open 7 days a week with current hours from 9 a.m. to 6 p.m., with miniature golf closing at 4:30 p.m. It is positioned as South Jersey's Premier Family Golf Center, catering to both casual players and those looking for structured practice.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Flightscope Radar Technology in the simulator
Voted best miniature golf in Gloucester County
Variety of activities for all skill levels
Clean and attractive environment for events

food_and_drink.notes: Patrons may bring their own food and drinks to events and parties.
No mention of alcohol service; venue does not supply food or drinks.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify, but it is typical to bring your own clubs for the simulator and driving range. Club rentals are listed as an available amenity.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, for parties and events you may bring any food or drink. The venue does not supply food or supplies but will clean up afterward.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website states the mini-golf has 36 holes for $7, but does not specify the time to complete 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Big Swing Golf Center is marketed as a family-friendly venue with a miniature golf course voted best in Gloucester County and is positioned as South Jersey's Premier Family Golf Center.
